cfg_statements.code: if __name__ == "__main__": n, m = map(int, input().split()) a = [int(item) for item in input().split()] max_a = max(a) freq = [0] * (max_a + 1) for item in a: freq[item] += 1 f = freq[:]; g = freq[:] fg = convolve(f, g) total = sum(a) * n * 2 cnt = n * n - m for i, item in enumerate(fg): use = min(cnt, item) total -= i * use cnt -= use if cnt == 0: break print(total)
for i, item in enumerate(fg): use = min(cnt, item) total -= i * use cnt -= use if cnt == 0: break
for i in range(n): j = 0 for k in range(h): j |= (i >> k & 1) << (h - 1 - k) if i < j: a[i], a[j] = a[j], a[i]
for k in range(h): j |= (i >> k & 1) << (h - 1 - k)
if i < j: a[i], a[j] = a[j], a[i]
while b < n: for j in range(b): w = exp(sign * 2.0j * pi / (2.0 * b) * j) for k in range(0, n, b*2): s = a[j + k] t = a[j + k + b] * w a[j + k] = s + t a[j + k + b] = s - t b *= 2
for j in range(b): w = exp(sign * 2.0j * pi / (2.0 * b) * j) for k in range(0, n, b*2): s = a[j + k] t = a[j + k + b] * w a[j + k] = s + t a[j + k + b] = s - t
for k in range(0, n, b*2): s = a[j + k] t = a[j + k + b] * w a[j + k] = s + t a[j + k + b] = s - t
if inverse: for i in range(n): a[i] /= n
for i in range(n): a[i] /= n
FG = [Fi * Gi for Fi, Gi in zip(F, G)]
